JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, March 17, 2016, in Department 525:
Nora Lapin, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Darin T. Judo, Esq.,((415) 262-1200) Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant Ricardo Roofing aka Ricardo Rodriquez who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Nora Lapin testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - various exhibits in folder

Counsel Darin T. Judo testifies on behalf of Ricardo Roofing and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1)- various exhibits in folder: contract, pictures, letters, etc.

Mr. Ricardo testifies on behalf of Ricardo Roofing under direct examination by Mr. Judo.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.
